title: glossopetalon clokeyi
intro: Glossopetalon clokeyi, also known as the sky pilot, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Grossulariaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and possessing antioxidant properties. Glossopetalon clokeyi can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used topically to treat various skin conditions and wounds.
